text:
Market today: Global tensions are high, with talk of new tariffs and shifting geopolitical power. Despite this, some veterans see a "classic buying opportunity." For your tech/chip names, this means potential volatility but also chances for growth if sentiment holds.

Your holdings: SOXL (-38.11%) and SPAL (-52.96%) are leveraged and showing deep losses; margin amplifies this. QQQI (-5.44%) is also on SELL status and nearing its stop.

Watch: Keep a close eye on geopolitical developments and how your leveraged ETFs react. Also, watch QQQI's price action around its 52 stop.

Bottom line: Stay sharp on your stops, especially with leveraged positions, as global tensions could bring volatility.
plays: Respect the 52 stop on QQQI; it's a SELL status and nearing that level.
Re-evaluate SPAL given its -52.96% loss and leveraged nature; the 21.38 stop is far above current price.
Consider trimming SOXL due to its -38.11% loss and leveraged decay; current price is well below its listed stop.
